steps.title: Solve the system algebraically
steps.content: We need $y=0$ and $y=8(x^2-36)$. Setting $0=8(x^2-36)$ gives $x^2=36$, so $x=\pm 6$. The pair $(6,0)$ satisfies both.

steps.title: Identify the matching pair
steps.content: Both $(6,0)$ and $(-6,0)$ satisfy the equations, but only $(6,0)$ appears in the answer choices. That confirms C is correct.
